sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12179" key="a)plhgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπληγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, of verses, <sense id="n12179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from metrical defect,</tr_> Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg007.perseus-grc1:p.498" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.498</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
